prompt: Cross-reference DREVEX s.r.o. supplier profile with RPVS data. Focus on threshold gaming pattern and buyer concentration.

assertions.description: Output is valid JSON matching the cross-referencer output schema
Identifies dodatok reduced amount to just below EU threshold with explanation of implication
Notes 3 of 4 contracts from same buyer as a pattern
Considers whether patterns could be innocent before confirming
All findings classified using the framework
Does not fabricate data not in the input
